bullish: The ICT Concepts + Doji Scanner's trend-bias table reads Uptrend (HH/HL structure)
A bullish Break of Structure has printed — confirmed or the live/unconfirmed BOS marker
Price is trading in the discount zone (below the indicator's 50% equilibrium line for the current swing range)
An unmitigated bullish Fair Value Gap or bullish Order Block sits nearby as support
A bullish reversal doji (Green Dragonfly, Green Doji, Green Cross, or Green Long-Legged) is printing at that support, or a liquidity sweep of a recent swing low just fired
bearish: The trend-bias table reads Downtrend (LH/LL structure)
A bearish Break of Structure has printed — confirmed or the live/unconfirmed BOS marker
Price is trading in the premium zone (above the 50% equilibrium line)
An unmitigated bearish Fair Value Gap or bearish Order Block sits nearby as resistance
A bearish reversal doji (Red Gravestone, Red Doji, Red Inverted Cross, or Red Long-Legged) is printing at that resistance, or a liquidity sweep of a recent swing high just fired
neutral: The trend-bias table reads Range, or the last BOS was invalidated
Price is sitting near the equilibrium midpoint with no doji signal printing
No unmitigated FVG or Order Block is within reach of current price

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes of the London or NY session open (kill-zone volatility)
If I have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
notes: GBPUSD via OANDA — do not use bare GBPUSD or FX:GBPUSD, they can resolve to the wrong instrument on this account (see ICT_STRATEGY_SPEC.md). Factor in BoE/Fed rate decisions and other macro events this week if relevant.
